name: Feature Mode Orchestration
description: Manages long-running iterative AI feature development cycles: multi-phase execution (TeamPlanning, PlanConsolidation, Execution, Evaluation), runtime cap enforcement, consecutive failure tracking, and token budget management.

  L307: FormatCompletionSummary(AgentTaskStatus status, TimeSpan duration, List<(string name, int added, int removed) -> string
  L318: GenerateCompletionSummaryAsync(string projectPath, string? gitStartHash, AgentTaskStatus status, TimeSpan duration, long inputTokens = 0, long outputTokens = 0, long cacheReadTokens = 0, long cacheCreationTokens = 0, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default) -> Task<string>

  L355: IsTokenLimitError(string output) -> bool

Models/TokenBudgetConfig.cs.content:
class TokenBudgetConfig
  TotalTokenBudget: long
  PhaseBudgets: Dictionary<FeatureModePhase, long>
  Level: OptimizationLevel
  Thresholds: Dictionary<OptimizationLevel, ProgressThresholds>
  EnableEarlyTermination: bool
  EnableSmartTruncation: bool
  EnableDynamicModelSelection: bool
  EnableContextDeduplication: bool
  EnableIterationMemory: bool
  MaxTokensPerChildResult: int
  MaxTotalChildResultTokens: int
  L100: GetCurrentThresholds() -> ProgressThresholds  // Gets the current progress thresholds based on optimization level.
  L110: GetPhaseBudget(FeatureModePhase phase) -> long  // Gets the phase budget for a specific phase.
  L120: CreateDefault() -> TokenBudgetConfig  // Creates a default configuration.
  L128: CreateSmall() -> TokenBudgetConfig  // Creates a configuration for small tasks.
  L147: CreateLarge() -> TokenBudgetConfig  // Creates a configuration for large tasks.
enum OptimizationLevel
    None, Conservative, Balanced
class ProgressThresholds
  MinProgressPerIteration: double
  MaxStallIterations: int
  TokenBurnRateLimit: double
